name: Switzerland
description: A symphony of snow-capped peaks, crystalline lakes and alpine meadows. Switzerland is where legendary luxury meets raw natural power. From the clockwork precision of its cities to the timeless silence of the Matterhorn, it is a destination that defines the pinnacle of travel.
bestSeasonsMonths: June to September and December to March
landmarks: The Matterhorn;;Mountain;;The world's most iconic peak, a jagged pyramid of rock and ice that commands the Zermatt skyline. A symbol of Swiss majesty.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop|Lake Lucerne;;Nature;;A breathtaking fjord-like lake surrounded by historic villages and soaring mountains. The birthplace of Swiss independence.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517330357046-3ab5b5dd42b1?q=80&w=2071&auto=format&fit=crop|Jungfraujoch;;Peak;;The 'Top of Europe' — a high-alpine wonderland of ice and snow accessible by a historic cogwheel railway.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1491904761614-41e77038dec4?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop
seasonsHighlights: Summer (July-August);;Lush green valleys alpine wildflowers and mirror-clear lakes perfect for hiking and lake cruises.|Winter (January-February);;A world-class ski paradise with cozy chalets fondues by the fire and sparkling snow-covered peaks.
